name: claude-session-hud
description: An ambient heads-up display for running many Claude Code sessions at once. Each chat gets a persistent colored badge showing its live state (working / done / awaiting your input) and an LLM-summarized name of what it's working on; the focused chat's VS Code window gets a matching color accent; a button opens a new chat in a new window; click a badge to jump to that chat. Windows.
